items.title: Mother who faked 6yo son's cancer diagnosis sentenced to over four years' jail

children.content: A mother who faked her six-year-old son's cancer diagnosis to raise thousands of dollars has been jailed for more than four years for the "cruel, calculated" and "manipulative" crime.

gallery.altText: a group photo of a family of four. their faces are blurred.

thumbnail.altText: a group photo of a family of four. their faces are blurred.

items.title: Tim Picton's accused killer pleads not guilty to manslaughter

children.content: The man accused of killing former Labor identity Tim Picton outside a Northbridge venue has pleaded not guilty to his manslaughter.

image.altText: Brodie Jake Dewar leaves court flanked by a young woman.

items.title: Hahndorf restaurant destroyed by fire with damage bill 'upwards' of $2 million

children.content: A fire has destroyed a restaurant at Hahndorf in the Adelaide Hills with a damage bill estimated at "upwards" of $2 million.

image.altText: Firefighters battle a restaurant fire

items.title: Evidence of 25-million-year-old platypuses with teeth found in outback

children.content: Researchers have discovered ancient platypus fossils in outback South Australia, where they are believed to have lived with lungfish, flamingos and freshwater dolphins. They also had major a difference from the modern species: well-formed teeth.

image.altText: An artwork showing a brown platypus in green water

items.title: Farmers and authorities on alert as locusts migrate to South Australia

children.content: Multiple locust swarms in South Australia's Riverland region have put farmers and authorities on alert, prompting the South Australian Plague Locust Commissioner to send surveying teams to the region.

image.altText: A person leaning out the window of a vehicle captures a paddock with thousands of locusts

items.title: Questions loom over LIV Golf's future, but a multi-million dollar course upgrade is playing through

children.content: The Malinauskas government took a calculated risk to redevelop the North Adelaide Golf Course in time for LIV Golf in 2028. It might not pay off.

articles.title: LIV Golf postpones US event amid tour's uncertain future

children.content: LIV Golf and the US state of Louisiana make a call on the tour's event in New Orleans, which was slated for June.

items.title: Former federal commissioner to lead review into scandal-plagued SA election

children.content: Former Australian electoral commissioner Tom Rogers is appointed to lead a "sweeping independent review" of the management and oversight of last month's SA state election and First Nations Voice election.

image.altText: A man with white hair, wearing a blue suit and glasses

items.title: Doctors fear new hospital design has 'increased risk of death' for women

children.content: Doctors say parts of the proposed design for Adelaide's $3.2 billion new Women's and Children's Hospital raise "significant concerns", including the location of the women's assessment service.

image.altText: A woman with shoulder-length blonde hair and glasses looks ahead.

items.title: Baby faces ongoing health concerns after birth delay in regional SA

children.content: A regional South Australian mother who faced a range of stressful diversions during her son's birth says she will always wonder whether his serious and ongoing health concerns were caused by delays in receiving care.

items.title: Adelaide motorists fined nearly $700,000 at new 40km/h school zones

children.content: The effectiveness of new speed limit signage has been questioned after the RAA revealed 1,100 people had been fined in just over one school term at two new 40km/h zones.

image.altText: Illuminated speed limit sign that says 40

items.title: Mother's impassioned plea after young daughter's cerebral palsy diagnosis

children.content: Ayla doesn't let disability slow her down, but her mother wants her to have the same opportunities as others.

items.title: Wheelchair user calls for 'common sense' after using accessible zone without permit

children.content: Disability advocate and wheelchair user Shane Hryhorec is calling for Adelaide Airport to use a common sense approach after being threatened with a fine for using an accessible pick-up zone without a permit.

articles.title: Headline inflation surges to 4.6 per cent as higher fuel prices bite

children.content: Headline inflation surges to 4.6 per cent in March, but underlying inflation remains at 3.3 per cent.

image.altText: old hand holding cash money notes with a list of bills on a notebook, calculator, glasses, lace tablecloth and cup of coffee

children.content: ABS data shows a rise in inflation to 4.6 per cent in March, the highest since September 2023 when the nation's economy was rebounding after the COVID-19 pandemic. Follow live.

items.title: Parents slam 'weak' school response after 21 girls targeted in deepfake scandal

children.content: Two parents of girls at a private school have criticised the institution's response to a deepfake incident, saying they were encouraged not to tell their daughters they had been identified in material shared in a boys' group chat.

image.altText: A boy with bruised knuckles sits and looks at his mobile phone.

items.title: King's speech to Congress hits on several Trump controversies

children.content: In a speech that was supposed to be apolitical, King Charles hits on some hot-button issues that are fuelling controversies around the Trump administration.

articles.title: Former FBI director charged over alleged social media photo threat to Trump

articles.title: US regulator orders review of TV licence after Trump criticises Kimmel

items.title: In signing Jarome Luai, Papua New Guinea's power has become real

items.title: Family says grandmother's death after weight-loss surgery preventable

items.title: Former ASIO chief raised questions about assessment of Bondi gunman

items.title: Don't assume El Niño warming will bring record heat

children.content: Australia's weather pattern is in a reset, and the weather events happening this month will act like the ingredients to determine the flavour of our climate for the rest of the year.
